title: andrographis tenuiflora
intro: Andrographis tenuiflora, also known as Kalmegh or Andrographis paniculata's lesser-known variant, is a plant species native to the Himalayan region. It has been used in traditional Ayurvedic and Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Andrographis tenuiflora include reduced symptoms of respiratory infections, improved immune function, and antioxidant effects. Andrographis tenuiflora is typically consumed in herbal preparations such as teas, capsules, or extracts, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
